The file /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp:
     1	#include "SYsULexer.h" // 确保这里的头文件名与您生成的词法分析器匹配
     2	#include <fstream>
     3	#include <iostream>
     4	#include <unordered_map>
     5	#include <sstream>
     6	
     7	// 映射定义，将ANTLR的tokenTypeName映射到clang的格式
     8	std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
     9	  { "Int", "int" },
    10	  { "Void", "void" },
    11	  { "Return", "return" },
    12	  { "If", "if" },
    13	  { "Else", "else" },
    14	  { "While", "while" },
    15	  { "For", "for" },
    16	  { "Break", "break" },
    17	  { "Continue", "continue" },
    18	  { "Identifier", "identifier" },
    19	  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
    20	  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
    21	  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },
    22	  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },
    23	  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
    24	  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },
    25	  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },
    26	  { "Semi", "semi" },
    27	  { "EOF", "eof" },
    28	  { "Equal", "equal" },
    29	  { "Plus", "plus" },
    30	  { "Minus", "minus" },
    31	  { "Star", "star" },
    32	  { "Div", "slash" },
    33	  { "Comma", "comma" },
    34	  { "Less", "less" },
    35	  { "Greater", "greater" },
    36	  { "LessEqual", "less_equal" },
    37	  { "GreaterEqual", "greater_equal" },
    38	  { "EqualEqual", "equal_equal" },
    39	  { "ExclaimEqual", "exclaim_equal" },
    40	  { "Ampersand", "amp" },
    41	  { "Pipe", "pipe" },
    42	  { "Caret", "caret" },
    43	  { "Tilde", "tilde" },
    44	  { "Question", "question" },
    45	  { "Colon", "colon" },
    46	  { "Exclamation", "exclaim" },
    47	  { "Percent", "percent" },
    48	  { "AmpersandAmpersand", "ampamp" },
    49	  { "PipePipe", "pipepipe" },
    50	  { "PlusPlus", "plusplus" },
    51	  { "MinusMinus", "minusminus" },
    52	  { "LeftShift", "lessless" },
    53	  { "RightShift", "greatergreater" },
    54	};
    55	
    56	// Global state for tracking file name and line tracking
    57	std::string currentFileName = "";
    58	int currentLine = 1;
    59	int lastTokenEndLine = 1;
    60	int lastTokenEndColumn = 0;
    61	
    62	void
    63	print_token(const antlr4::Token* token,
    64	            const antlr4::CommonTokenStream& tokens,
    65	            std::ofstream& outFile,
    66	            const antlr4::Lexer& lexer)
    67	{
    68	  auto& vocabulary = lexer.getVocabulary();
    69	
    70	  auto tokenTypeName =
    71	    std::string(vocabulary.getSymbolicName(token->getType()));
    72	
    73	  if (tokenTypeName.empty())
    74	    tokenTypeName = "<UNKNOWN>"; // 处理可能的空字符串情况
    75	
    76	  if (tokenTypeMapping.find(tokenTypeName) != tokenTypeMapping.end()) {
    77	    tokenTypeName = tokenTypeMapping[tokenTypeName];
    78	  }
    79	
    80	  // Get token position
    81	  int tokenLine = token->getLine();
    82	  int tokenColumn = token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1;
    83	
    84	  // Check for StartOfLine and LeadingSpace
    85	  bool startOfLine = false;
    86	  bool leadingSpace = false;
    87	
    88	  if (tokenLine > lastTokenEndLine) {
    89	    // New line - this token is at start of line
    90	    startOfLine = true;
    91	    leadingSpace = true; // Assume leading space if on new line
    92	  } else if (tokenLine == lastTokenEndLine) {
    93	    // Same line as previous token
    94	    if (lastTokenEndColumn < tokenColumn - 1) {
    95	      // There's space between previous token end and this token
    96	      if (lastTokenEndColumn == 1 || tokenColumn == 1) {
    97	        // This is the first token on the line
    98	        startOfLine = true;
    99	      }
   100	      leadingSpace = true;
   101	    }
   102	  }
   103	
   104	  // Update last token position
   105	  std::string tokenText = token->getText();
   106	  if (tokenText != "<EOF>") {
   107	    lastTokenEndLine = tokenLine;
   108	    lastTokenEndColumn = tokenColumn + tokenText.length();
   109	  }
   110	
   111	  // Build location info
   112	  std::string locInfo = " Loc=<" + currentFileName + ":" + 
   113	                        std::to_string(tokenLine) + ":" + 
   114	                        std::to_string(tokenColumn) + ">";
   115	
   116	  if (token->getText() != "<EOF>")
   117	    outFile << tokenTypeName << " '" << token->getText() << "'";
   118	  else
   119	    outFile << tokenTypeName << " '"
   120	            << "'";
   121	  if (startOfLine)
   122	    outFile << "\t [StartOfLine]";
   123	  if (leadingSpace)
   124	    outFile << " [LeadingSpace]";
   125	  outFile << locInfo << std::endl;
   126	}
   127	
   128	int
   129	main(int argc, char* argv[])
   130	{
   131	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
